mapper.select: SELECT CAST(o.id AS CHAR) AS id, o.order_no AS orderNo, COALESCE(NULLIF(customer.company_name, ''), ma.member_name) AS customerName, merchant.shop_name AS merchantName, o.order_status AS orderStatus, o.pay_status AS payStatus, o.shipment_status AS shipmentStatus, o.aftersale_status AS aftersaleStatus, DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = o.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN member_account ma ON ma.id = customer.member_id AND ma.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = o.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST(o.id AS CHAR) AS id, o.order_no AS orderNo, COALESCE(NULLIF(customer.company_name, ''), ma.member_name) AS customerName, merchant.shop_name AS merchantName, o.order_status AS orderStatus, o.pay_status AS payStatus, o.shipment_status AS shipmentStatus, o.aftersale_status AS aftersaleStatus, o.goods_amount AS goodsAmount, o.freight_amount AS freightAmount, o.discount_amount AS discountAmount, o.pay_amount AS payAmount, o.cost_amount AS costAmount, o.profit_amount AS profitAmount, o.receiver_name AS receiverName, o.receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, CONCAT(o.receiver_province, o.receiver_city, o.receiver_district, o.receiver_address) AS receiverAddress, o.customer_remark AS customerRemark, DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = o.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN member_account ma ON ma.id = customer.member_id AND ma.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = o.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.id = #{orderId} AND o.merchant_id = #{merchantId} LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST(o.id AS CHAR) AS id, o.order_no AS order_no, customer.company_name AS customer_name, merchant.shop_name AS merchant_name, o.pay_amount AS amount, o.order_status AS status, o.pay_status AS pay_status, COALESCE(s.tracking_no, '-') AS logistics_no, DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS created_at, o.aftersale_status AS aftersale_status, o.order_source AS order_source FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = o.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN member_account ma ON ma.id = customer.member_id AND ma.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = o.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN shipment_info s ON s.order_id = o.id WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND customer.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 ) ORDER BY o.created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = o.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND customer.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 )

SELECT CAST(o.id AS CHAR) AS id, o.order_no AS order_no, COALESCE(NULLIF(customer.company_name, ''), ma.member_name) AS customer_name, merchant.shop_name AS merchant_name, o.pay_amount AS amount, o.order_status AS status, o.pay_status AS pay_status, COALESCE(s.tracking_no, '-') AS logistics_no, DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS created_at, COALESCE(a.aftersale_status, '-') AS aftersale_status, o.order_source AS order_source FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = o.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN member_account ma ON ma.id = customer.member_id AND ma.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = o.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN shipment_info s ON s.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, aftersale_status FROM aftersale_info WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1 ) a ON a.order_id = o.id WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND merchant.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 ) ORDER BY o.created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = o.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND merchant.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 )

SELECT o.order_no FROM order_info o JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = o.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.id = #{orderId} AND customer.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 ) LIMIT 1

SELECT o.order_no FROM order_info o JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = o.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.id = #{orderId} AND merchant.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 ) LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST(o.id AS CHAR) AS id, CAST(o.merchant_goods_id AS CHAR) AS merchantGoodsId, CAST(o.sku_id AS CHAR) AS skuId, o.spu_name AS spuName, o.sku_name AS skuName, o.spec_text AS specText, o.quantity AS quantity, o.base_price AS basePrice, o.member_price AS memberPrice, o.customer_price AS customerPrice, o.final_unit_price AS finalUnitPrice, o.final_amount AS finalAmount, o.cost_price AS costPrice, o.profit_amount AS profitAmount, CAST(mg.main_image_id AS CHAR) AS mainImageId FROM order_item o LEFT JOIN merchant_goods mg ON mg.id = o.merchant_goods_id AND mg.deleted = 0 WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY o.id DESC

SELECT CAST(id AS CHAR) AS id, record_type AS recordType, pay_method AS payMethod, pay_amount AS payAmount, CAST(voucher_file_id AS CHAR) AS voucherFileId, transaction_no AS transactionNo, pay_status AS payStatus, CAST(aftersale_id AS CHAR) AS aftersaleId, remark AS remark, DATE_FORMAT(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(confirmed_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS confirmedAt FROM payment_record WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY created_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT CAST(s.id AS CHAR) AS id, s.carrier_name AS carrierName, s.tracking_no AS trackingNo, s.logistics_remark AS logisticsRemark, COALESCE(shipper.nick_name, shipper.username, '') AS shipOperatorName, COALESCE(receiver.nick_name, receiver.username, '') AS signOperatorName, DATE_FORMAT(s.ship_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS shipTime, DATE_FORMAT(s.sign_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS signTime FROM shipment_info s LEFT JOIN sys_user shipper ON shipper.id = s.created_by LEFT JOIN sys_user receiver ON receiver.id = s.updated_by WHERE s.order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST(id AS CHAR) AS id, aftersale_no AS aftersaleNo, aftersale_type AS aftersaleType, aftersale_status AS aftersaleStatus, apply_amount AS applyAmount, approved_amount AS approvedAmount, return_tracking_no AS returnTrackingNo, DATE_FORMAT(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(merchant_receive_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS merchantReceiveTime, DATE_FORMAT(finish_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS finishTime FROM aftersale_info WHERE deleted = 0 AND order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY created_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT CAST(log.id AS CHAR) AS id, CAST(log.aftersale_id AS CHAR) AS aftersaleId, log.action_type AS actionType, log.old_status AS oldStatus, log.new_status AS newStatus, log.operator_name AS operatorName, log.remark AS remark, DATE_FORMAT(log.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM aftersale_audit_log log JOIN aftersale_info a ON a.id = log.aftersale_id AND a.deleted = 0 WHERE a.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY log.created_time DESC, log.id DESC

SELECT CAST(log.id AS CHAR) AS id, CAST(log.order_item_id AS CHAR) AS orderItemId, CONCAT(item.spu_name, ' / ', item.sku_name) AS itemName, log.old_quantity AS oldQuantity, log.new_quantity AS newQuantity, log.old_final_unit_price AS oldFinalUnitPrice, log.new_final_unit_price AS newFinalUnitPrice, log.old_final_amount AS oldFinalAmount, log.new_final_amount AS newFinalAmount, log.operator_name AS operatorName, log.remark AS remark, DATE_FORMAT(log.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM order_item_adjust_log log LEFT JOIN order_item item ON item.id = log.order_item_id WHERE log.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY log.id DESC
